# Documentation toolchain (kept separate from the services' runtime deps).
# Install with:  pip install -r docs/requirements-docs.txt
# Build with:    mkdocs build --strict   (or  mkdocs serve  to preview)
#
# The Python API reference is generated by mkdocstrings, which parses the
# source statically via griffe — it does NOT import the modules, so the heavy
# CUDA/TensorRT/torch stack is not required to build the docs.
mkdocs-material>=9.5
mkdocstrings[python]>=0.26
griffe>=1.5
mkdocs-gen-files>=0.5
mkdocs-literate-nav>=0.6
# Optional: lets mkdocstrings pretty-format rendered signatures.
black>=24.0
